message:
fix(tui): eliminate header staircase effect with block-centered layout

The header section independently centered each line (banner, session
title, context line, handoff line, context warning), causing a visual
"staircase" effect where lines of different widths each had different
left margins. This was especially noticeable with the animated banner
which is wider than the text lines below it.

- Collect all header elements and measure the widest one to establish
  a consistent block width
- Calculate a single left margin that centers the entire block
- Render all elements left-aligned within that centered block using
  a uniform padding prefix instead of per-line lipgloss centering
- Switch stats bar rendering from lipgloss center to styles.CenterText
  for consistency with the rest of the layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
